chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI First Appeals No.80 and 81 of 2021 Zafar Iqbal and Abdul Azeem Versus Additional District Judge VIII & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For order son exemption applications. 3. For hearing of main cases. 4. For orders on stay applications. Dated: 23.02.2024 None present. -.-.- On the first date the appellants were in attendance whereas their counsel could not reach the Court and on their request short adjournment was granted. On the following date i.e. 09.11.2021 again request for adjournment was made by the appellants followed by absence of appellants and their counsel on 15.12.2021 and on 02.03.2022 fresh Vakalatnama by an advocate was filed on behalf of the appellants with request for adjournment. However, even the new counsel was called absent on the next date i.e. 27.11.2023 and so also the appellants. Today the position is same. Neither appellants nor their counsel are in attendance. There is no intimation either. It seems that they have lost interest in the proceedings. Both the appeals are accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution along with pending applications. Judge Judge
